query: SELECT id, status, duration, contactName, contactPhone, teamMemberName, callType, classification, callSource, createdAt, updatedAt, tenantId FROM calls WHERE status NOT IN ('completed', 'skipped', 'failed') ORDER BY createdAt ASC LIMIT 10;
